# Cape Town Peptide Club — llms.txt
# Research compounds. HPLC-verified. Cape Town, South Africa.
# https://www.capetownpeptideclub.co.za

## About

Cape Town Peptide Club (RTD) is South Africa's premier supplier of research-grade peptides. Founded in Cape Town, Western Cape, the club provides HPLC-verified research compounds to clinicians, researchers, biohackers, and longevity enthusiasts across South Africa and beyond.

All products are strictly for research use only. Not for human consumption. Every batch is independently tested by third-party laboratories.

## Key Information

- **Company**: Cape Town Peptide Club (operating as RTD)
- **Location**: Atlantic Seaboard, Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
- **Website**: https://www.capetownpeptideclub.co.za
- **Email**: info@capetownpeptideclub.co.za
- **Phone**: +27 21 555 0192
- **Instagram**: @ridethetide
- **WhatsApp**: +27 21 555 0192 (Mon–Fri 9:00–17:00 SAST)
- **Currency**: South African Rand (ZAR)
- **Shipping**: Nationwide cold-chain delivery, 2–5 business days
- **Payment**: EFT, Instant EFT, Credit/Debit Card, SnapScan, USDC, SOL
- **Free shipping threshold**: R2,500
- **Minimum order**: 3 vials

## Product Catalog

### Peptides
- **BPC-157** — R899 — Gastric-derived 15-residue peptide for tissue repair and angiogenesis research. Purity: 99.4% HPLC.
- **Retatrutide** — R1,519 — Triple agonist (GLP-1 / GIP / Glucagon) metabolic compound. Purity: 99.4% HPLC.
- **GHK-Cu** — R769 — Copper-binding tripeptide for collagen induction and skin-matrix research. Purity: 99.6% HPLC.
- **CJC-1295 + Ipamorelin** — R749 — GH-secretagogue pairing for pulsatile release research. Purity: 99.3% HPLC.

### Blends
- **BPC-157 + TB-500 Blend** — R1,449 — Tissue-repair duo for recovery and regenerative research. Purity: 99.2% HPLC.
- **GLOW Stack** — R1,629 — Triple-compound aesthetic and dermal regeneration stack. Purity: 99.1% HPLC.

### Categories
Peptides, Blends, Longevity, Nootropics, Immunomodulators, Supplies, Bulk

## Quality Standards

- Every batch independently HPLC-tested
- Cold-chain shipping from Cape Town
- SA-based stock — no customs delays
- Discreet unmarked packaging
- 48-hour dispatch
- 300+ reviews, 4.9★ average rating
- Certificates of Analysis available per product

## Research Platform

The Cape Town Peptide Club operates RTD Observatory — the world's first rigorous peptide validation platform that:
- Parses 286,000+ community messages into structured intelligence
- Tracks 31 peptides across healing, metabolic, cognitive, growth, immune categories
- Maintains 22 observational trials with community-reported outcomes
- References 10+ peer-reviewed clinical papers
- Provides a message parser for extracting peptide data from Reddit, Telegram, and biohacker logs

## Events

The Cape Town Peptide Club hosts invite-only gatherings:
- **Next event**: November 16, 2026
- **Location**: Atlantic Seaboard, Cape Town
- **Features**: Live injection tutorials, expert panels, pop-up pharmacy, IV drip lounge, bloodwork kits, peptide fridge giveaway
- **Capacity**: Limited to 100 attendees, 3x oversubscribed

## Shipping & Returns

- Nationwide delivery across South Africa
- 2–5 business days
- Ice-packed, temperature-monitored cold-chain packaging
- Discreet unmarked outer packaging
- Tracking provided via email
- No returns accepted (research compounds)

## Important Disclaimers

- **For research use only** — not for human consumption
- This website does not provide medical advice
- Consult a licensed healthcare provider before use
- All products sold are for laboratory research purposes
